targetSenders().details: Returns sender allowlist configured via `targetSender` (empty means no sender allowlist).

invariant_allocPlusRefundEqualsCommitted.notice: After finalization, sum of (allocUsdc + refund) for all committers equals totalCommitted

invariant_armConservation().notice: ARM conservation: contract balance = initial funding - claimed ARM - unalloc withdrawn

invariant_hopCapEnforcement().notice: Hop cap enforcement: no participant's committed exceeds their hop's cap

invariant_noOverAllocation().notice: No participant allocation ever exceeds their commitment (in USDC value)

invariant_nonNegativeBalances().notice: Contract never goes to negative balance (sanity — Solidity would revert, but belt-and-suspenders)

invariant_phaseMonotonicity().notice: Phase only moves forward, never backward

invariant_usdcConservation().notice: USDC conservation: contract balance = totalCommitted - claimed refunds - proceeds - cancel refunds
